plan.coverTitle: AEW Dominates the Landscape: A New Era Begins
plan.coverDeck: AEW's rise to the top marks a significant shift in the wrestling world as they claim the title of Company of the Month.

sections.title: AEW's Ascendance: Company of the Month
sections.focus: September 2099 sees AEW solidifying its position at the pinnacle of the wrestling industry, achieving a Landscape Score of 93.8 and earning the title of Company of the Month.

sections.title: A Competitive September: Highlights from the Wrestling World
sections.focus: A broad look at the wrestling landscape in September showcases the competitive events from various promotions, including TNA's major event dominating the month with an impressive rating.

sections.title: Shifting Tides: Promotions on the Move
sections.focus: TNA and OWL both experience notable shifts in their rankings, with TNA climbing to third place and OWL slipping to second, as their respective shows reflect this changing dynamic.

sections.title: CMLL's Finest: A Match to Remember
sections.focus: CMLL's Test match between Alpha and Beta takes the spotlight this month, rated an outstanding 4.95, marking it as the Match of the Month.

sections.title: Top Talents Shine Across Promotions
sections.focus: Highlighting the standout performances of wrestlers across the landscape, with particular attention to those who excelled during major events, including TNA's Test Champion Delta.

sections.title: Championship Landscape: Who Holds the Gold?
sections.focus: An examination of current champions in the wrestling world, featuring champions like Test Champion Vega of WWE and Test Champion Sol of CMLL, along with the implications of recent title matches.

sections.title: Speculation in the Air: What’s Next for the Wrestling World?
sections.focus: Exploring potential shifts and developments in contracts and signings, including the recent signing of Test Wrestler Nova with AAA and what impact it may have on the promotion.

sections.title: The State of Wrestling: A Time for Change
sections.focus: Reflecting on the shifting dynamics of the wrestling industry, emphasizing the importance of competition and what this means for the future of promotions, especially in light of AEW's recent success.
